pr.title: Record: Chunk-Based N-gram Backoff + Score-First TTT (0.295 BPB)

output.summary: Chunked order-9 N-gram backoff with entropy/order-aware mixing plus score-first LoRA TTT on a compact GQA model (GPTQ int5).
output.valOnlyReasoning: Standard training plus eval/TTT workflow without dedicated validation-only training.
techniques: Order-9 chunked N-gram cache with entropy and per-order multipliers
Score-first LoRA TTT with AdamW and Polyak averaging
GPTQ int5 export with synchronized chunk cache updates
